name: The Gregor Private Indoor Golf and Club
address: 3335 Orchard Lake Rd, Keego Harbor, MI 48320
about: The Gregor is a private luxury indoor golf club where members come to socialize, entertain, and play golf. It offers a modern, private environment accessible 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The facility provides two AboutGOLF™ curved simulator enclosures designed for an immersive golf experience, with premium furnishings and an atmosphere similar to a premier country club, but more intimate and curated. Membership is limited to greater accessibility and features an online portal for scheduling and managing bookings.
why_golfers_like_it: Accurate and immersive golf tracking with 'aG Locker' for storing stats
Curated private club atmosphere similar to premier country clubs

food_and_drink.notes: Refreshment area available; details on food service not specified
Wet bar area with fridge, ice machine and glassware available

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium curved enclosures with advanced launch monitor technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue offers club fittings, so members may use provided equipment or bring their own. Specific rental policies are not detailed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a wet bar area and refreshment station, but it does not specify a BYOB policy. Food and drink service appears to be available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an estimated time for playing 18 holes. As a premium indoor simulator experience, time would depend on player pace and activity.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Gregor is explicitly described as a '21+ private luxury indoor golf club,' indicating it is not intended for children.
